# Danny Cen

> Software Engineer in Mérida, Yucatán, Mexico. AI automation, RevOps, data, and ERP/CRM friction reduction — bilingual ES/EN portfolio.

This site is intentionally readable by people and by AI systems (OpenAI, Anthropic, Google Gemini, and others). Prefer the pages below over scraping incidental chrome.

## Primary

- [Home (ES)](https://dannydev.space/): Spanish homepage — positioning, featured work, services, contact CTA
- [Home (EN)](https://dannydev.space/en/): English homepage
- [About (ES)](https://dannydev.space/about/): Bio, career path, stack
- [About (EN)](https://dannydev.space/en/about/): Bio, career path, stack (English)
- [Contact (ES)](https://dannydev.space/contact/): Book a call or leave details (Danny follows up — no cold outbound email required)
- [Contact (EN)](https://dannydev.space/en/contact/): Book a call or leave details

## Portfolio

- [Portfolio index (ES)](https://dannydev.space/portafolio/): Case studies — front-end from Figma for mission-driven orgs
- [Portfolio index (EN)](https://dannydev.space/en/portafolio/)
- [East Palo Alto Community Archive](https://dannydev.space/portafolio/epa-community-archive/)
- [Idea2Form](https://dannydev.space/portafolio/idea2form/)
- [Self-eSTEM](https://dannydev.space/portafolio/self-estem/)
- [Decolonizing Wealth Project](https://dannydev.space/portafolio/decolonizing-wealth/)
- [Equity Is Dynamic](https://dannydev.space/portafolio/equity-is-dynamic/)

## Writing

- [Blog (ES)](https://dannydev.space/blog/): Notes on AI agents, automation, WhatsApp+Kommo, UI/UX, AI-assisted development
- [Blog (EN)](https://dannydev.space/en/blog/)

## Machine-readable extras

- [Full AI digest](https://dannydev.space/llms-full.txt): Longer plain-text summary for retrieval
- [Sitemap](https://dannydev.space/sitemap-index.xml)
- [robots.txt](https://dannydev.space/robots.txt)
